name: convenience
description: Consumer-convenience defaults: workspace copy-path hotkeys (Cmd+- copy full path; Cmd+= copy vault-relative path) + Dataview JS enable. NEW v0.21.1: introduces hotkeys[] + community_plugin_settings[] manifest fields + applyHotkeys + applyCommunityPluginData installer helpers. Allowlist 9 -> 11 (.obsidian/plugins/dataview/data.json + .obsidian/hotkeys.json); helper count 7 -> 9. applyCommunityPluginData short-circuits when any external_plugins[] id is absent from .obsidian/community-plugins.json (broadened gate vs styling helpers' required:true semantic, since materializing into a missing plugin's data.json is a wasted write).
